# Notice

## Project Lineage

This repository was originally forked from [`ericc-ch/copilot-api`](https://github.com/ericc-ch/copilot-api).

Due to the original project being unmaintained for a long time, this project has been detached from the fork and is now maintained independently.

## Acknowledgements

Many thanks to Erick Christian Purwanto and all contributors to the original project for the foundation they built.

Their work made this independent continuation possible, and the original attribution remains preserved in [`LICENSE`](./LICENSE).
